title: Parkour Gaming Website with 3D Obstacle Course

requirements.text: Build a 3D parkour game environment using React Three Fiber with a series of platforms, ramps, gaps, and obstacles arranged as a challenging obstacle course the player must navigate from start to finish.

quotes: 3D parkour game environment with platforms and obstacles

acceptanceCriteria: A 3D scene renders with a clearly defined start and finish zone.
At least 15 platforms of varying sizes and heights are present.
Obstacles such as moving barriers, narrow ledges, and gaps between platforms are included.
The environment has a visually distinct skybox or background.

requirements.text: Implement smooth player movement controls: WASD or arrow keys to move/run, spacebar to jump (with single and double-jump support), and mouse look to control the camera direction in first- or third-person view.

quotes: Player movement controls: running and jumping

acceptanceCriteria: The player character moves forward, backward, left, and right with WASD or arrow keys.
Pressing spacebar causes the player to jump; a second spacebar press in the air triggers a double jump.
Player cannot move through solid platforms or obstacles (basic collision detection).
Camera follows the player and allows mouse-look rotation.
Player resets to the last checkpoint or start when falling off the course.

requirements.text: Add a run timer that starts when the player leaves the start zone and stops when the player reaches the finish zone, displaying elapsed time in MM:SS.ms format on a persistent HUD overlay.
acceptanceCriteria: Timer begins automatically when the player crosses the start trigger.
Timer stops and highlights in a distinct color when the player crosses the finish trigger.
Elapsed time is shown in MM:SS.ms format on-screen at all times during a run.
A restart button resets the timer and player position.

requirements.text: Implement a local leaderboard that records the player's top 10 fastest completion times per level, displayed on a scoreboard screen accessible from the main menu and after completing a run.

quotes: score tracking to keep things competitive

acceptanceCriteria: Completion times are saved in localStorage and persist across page refreshes.
The top 10 fastest times are displayed in ranked order on the leaderboard screen.
After finishing a run, the player sees their time and their rank on the leaderboard.
Players can enter a short name (up to 12 characters) to associate with their time.

requirements.text: Create a main menu screen with options to Start Game, view the Leaderboard, and see Controls. Include a brief animated 3D preview of the parkour course as the background.
acceptanceCriteria: Main menu displays Start Game, Leaderboard, and Controls buttons.
An auto-panning 3D preview of the course plays behind the menu.
Controls screen lists all keyboard and mouse inputs with descriptions.
Leaderboard screen shows the top 10 times with player names.

requirements.text: Apply a high-energy urban/neon-graffiti visual theme throughout the app: dark backgrounds with vivid neon accent colors (electric orange, lime green, hot pink), bold angular typography, glowing platform edges, and particle effects on jumps and landings.
acceptanceCriteria: All UI screens (menu, HUD, leaderboard) use the dark + neon color palette consistently.
Platform edges emit a neon glow effect in the 3D scene.
A particle burst effect plays when the player jumps or lands.
Typography is bold, angular, and legible against dark backgrounds.

constraints: All game logic and state must live in the frontend; no backend persistence is required.
Use React Three Fiber and Three.js for all 3D rendering.
Do not edit any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui.
nonGoals: Backend leaderboard storage — local storage only.
User authentication or Internet Identity integration.

required: Neon parkour logo with bold angular letters and glowing orange outline on a transparent background (parkour-logo.dim_512x128.png)
Dark urban skybox panorama with faint neon city lights and graffiti silhouettes (skybox-bg.dim_2048x1024.png)
